class.name: theimc_bt_nodes/GoToPose
class.description: BehaviorTree.CPP node that sends a NavigateToPose goal.

class.name: theimc_bt_nodes/PublishRailCommand
class.description: BehaviorTree.CPP node that publishes a rail command.

class.name: theimc_bt_nodes/RailApproach
class.description: BehaviorTree.CPP node that sends a RailApproach goal.

class.name: theimc_bt_nodes/WaitForRailState
class.description: BehaviorTree.CPP node that waits for a rail state.

class.name: theimc_bt_nodes/WaitForMissionTrigger
class.description: BehaviorTree.CPP node that waits for a mission trigger.

class.name: theimc_bt_nodes/WaitSeconds
class.description: BehaviorTree.CPP node that waits for a fixed duration.
